title: Diptera sinensis
taxonomy: Diptera sinensis is classified as a species within the genus Diptera, which is a group of flowering plants in the family Gentianaceae. The Gentianaceae family is a part of the order Gentianales, which also includes other families such as Apocynaceae and Loganiaceae. The order Gentianales is a member of the clade Asterids, which is one of the two main clades of flowering plants, the other being Rosids. The clade Asterids is part of the larger group called Angiosperms. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships among different plant species and families.
